_schema.description: Region → retailer catalog used by price-scraper. Add a region by adding a top-level key matching requirements.region.country (ISO-3166 alpha-2). Each retailer has a category, base URL, and optional flags.

categories.retail: Mainstream PC parts retailer, GST/VAT inclusive, full warranty
categories.grey: International / parallel import — flag risk in price-scraper output
categories.used: Used/refurb only — include only if requirements.risk_tolerance.used_marketplace == true
categories.aggregator: Price comparison engine — useful for cross-checks, can be stale
categories.prebuilt_oem: OEM direct (Apple, Minisforum, Framework, Beelink, etc.)
categories.prebuilt_reseller: Resells prebuilts (NUCs, mini PCs at mainstream retailers)
categories.sbc: Single-board computer specialist (Pi, Rock, Orange Pi, Jetson)
categories.used_enterprise: Refurbished enterprise SFF (HP EliteDesk, Dell OptiPlex, Lenovo ThinkCentre)

flags.flash_sale_pricing: Listed prices often unreliable due to flash sales (e.g. AliExpress)

AU.tax_note: All AU residential retail prices are GST-inclusive

retailers.name: AliExpress
retailers.notes: Shipping to AU often blocked on individual SKUs; verify before recommending

retailers.name: Facebook Marketplace
retailers.notes: Filter by city: Melbourne, Sydney, Brisbane, Perth, Adelaide

retailers.name: Apple Refurbished AU
retailers.notes: ~15% cheaper than new, full warranty — always check for Mac recommendations

retailers.name: Framework
retailers.notes: Ships to AU; check shipping cost and duty

retailers.name: PC Byte
retailers.notes: Refurbished HP/Dell/Lenovo SFF — good for cheap k8s workers

retailers.name: element14 AU
retailers.notes: Industrial/volume; Jetson via NVIDIA partner channel

_region_template._comment: Copy this block, rename to ISO-3166 country code, fill in retailers, set _default if appropriate. Set tax_inclusive based on whether listed prices include VAT/sales tax in this region.
_region_template.tax_note: US listed prices typically do not include sales tax
